stocks.impact_theory: FDA granted full approval to FILSPARI for FSGS, removing accelerated approval risks and expanding addressable market for rare kidney disease treatment. Economic: accelerates commercialization, boosts revenue projections. Psychology: relief rally post-regulatory hurdle. Historical: similar to Vertex's cystic fibrosis approvals (+40% spikes). Analogies: like a locked door finally opening to a treasure room; or a racehorse cleared from vet hold bursting ahead.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: FDA approval news drove 37% surge; X sentiment highly positive on breakthrough; web news confirms expanded label, partnerships like Ligand up too.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +20% gains on commercialization momentum
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Competition, reimbursement delays, clinical data scrutiny

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst with strong volume and historical parallels; high X engagement.

stocks.impact_theory: Q4 earnings beat EPS ($0.34 vs $0.18) but revenue down 1% to $5.9B, margins sacrificed for volume via pricing cuts and subprime lending; paused buybacks. Economic: signals weak used car demand amid high rates. Psychology: disappointment on guidance. Historical: similar to 2022 auto retail slumps. Analogies: like slashing prices in a fire sale; captain dumping cargo to stay afloat.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings reaction despite beat due to margin pressure; X mixed-negative on subprime risks; web highlights financing losses.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Rate cuts boost demand, inventory normalization

stocks.justification: Strong beat but forward outlook cloudy; solid data.

stocks.impact_theory: Analyst initiations/upgrades (Jefferies Buy $175, Needham $220) highlight AI connectivity demand disconnect. Economic: high growth in data center semis. Psychology: re-rating post-pullback. Historical: Nvidia peers in AI boom. Analogies: undervalued engine in a speeding AI train; overlooked gear shifting into high.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 18% surge on analyst love; X bullish on AI growth; web notes revenue doubling.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: AI hype fade, competition from Broadcom

stocks.impact_theory: Oil plunge 8% on Mideast peace/US-Iran talks lowers fuel costs (30-40% expenses). Economic: margin expansion. Psychology: risk-off unwind. Historical: 2014-15 oil crash rallied airlines +50%. Analogies: lighter backpack for marathon runner; cheaper gas for road trip.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Sector tailwind from oil drop; X ties to energy sentiment; web confirms airline gains.

stocks.impact_theory: Profit-taking after YTD runup amid analyst valuation splits post-earnings; convertible notes maturity concerns. Economic: growth slowing to 7%. Psychology: overbought unwind. Historical: CDN peers post-hype. Analogies: balloon deflating after inflation; post-party hangover.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 14% drop on analyst caution; X neutral-mixed; web notes high valuation vs peers.
